entry.title: GWAC NNG15SC10B (46) awarded to EMERGENT, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: SEWP V CONTRACT, CATEGORY A, GROUP A F&O SEWP V PROVIDES HIGH-END TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS OPTIMIZE PRODUCTIVITY THROUGH UTILIZATION OF POWERFUL COMPUTER SYSTEMS, STATE OF THE ART SUPPORTING PERIPHERALS AND SOFTWARE ON STANDARDIZED BUT CUSTOMIZABLE SYSTEMS AND ENSURE INTEROPERABILITY OF RELIABLE, APPLICABLE, AND AFFORDABLE IT PRODUCTS/SOLUTIONS.

entry.title: GWAC NNG15SC10B (47) awarded to EMERGENT, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: SEWP V CONTRACT, CATEGORY A, GROUP A F&O SEWP V PROVIDES HIGH-END TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS OPTIMIZE PRODUCTIVITY THROUGH UTILIZATION OF POWERFUL COMPUTER SYSTEMS, STATE OF THE ART SUPPORTING PERIPHERALS AND SOFTWARE ON STANDARDIZED BUT CUSTOMIZABLE SYSTEMS AND ENSURE INTEROPERABILITY OF RELIABLE, APPLICABLE, AND AFFORDABLE IT PRODUCTS/SOLUTIONS.

entry.title: GWAC NNG15SC10B (48) awarded to EMERGENT, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION CORRECTS A PREVIOUS ADMINISTRATIVE OVERSIGHT. THE AFFECTED CHANGES WERE ACCIDENTALLY LEFT OUT DURING THE INITIAL PROCESSING BUT ARE NOW BEING COMPLETED TO ENSURE ACCURATE RECORDS AND COMPLIANCE. THIS UPDATE ADDRESSES THE ERROR AND CORRECTLY REFLECTS THE NECESSARY CHANGES.NNG15SC10B MODIFICATION 48
